emails.subject: October deals
emails.body: October deals Daren, I have 2 allocation exceptions that require a deal to be extended. Meter 98-1488 Tenaska is showing small volumes flowed on days there was no deal. Can you extend the deal throughout the month so that the volumes will have a deal to link to. I have the same situation on meter 98-1601. If you have any questions, please let me know. Thanks, Susan
